items: Most art assets still outstanding after the native-3D rework
Mission content beyond the first playable

barRaise.topFinding: Nothing material moved since the 2026-07-05 run: the two commits since are non-code housekeeping (outputs/ scratch removal, routine rename bar-raise-hbh to bar-raise-hordes) and the game code plus GDD sit unchanged at v0.99.31. Both hard rules pass (GDD ends </html>, colorblind_mode declared once) so no BLOCK, and today's canonical audit confirms zero new drift with the four save_load GDD structural items now properly tracked by pending queue item hbh-gdd-saveload-structural-refs-2026-07-05. All four open findings were re-verified on disk and remain open: the save_load GDD drift (attended edit), the CLAUDE.md:58 Midjourney / 'new 2D assets' handler line (still present, runsOpen 7), and the two cross-project automation items (queue-drain added vs addedAt field mismatch, and the missing missed-window catch-up on the bar-raise routine, which the 07-06 rename did not add). None is clearable from an HBH-scoped session. Weighted health holds at 88.

actions.title: Fix the four save_load GDD drift spots (two <tr> deletions at :4651-4652 and :4841, two prose rewrites at :2084 and :4726) so the doc stops presenting the retired autoload as live.
Neutralize the Midjourney reference and 'new 2D assets' tagline in the GitHub-visible CLAUDE.md asset-workflow section (CLAUDE.md:58).
Fix the queue-drain-4h triage to read 'added' instead of 'addedAt' so staleness triage fires.
Add a missed-window catch-up to the bar-raise routine so a closed-app gap self-heals.

deferred.title: Pick the animated-vs-instanced crowd render path: the v0.99.30 re-baseline shows animated Zombie1 at 26 fps at 1k enemies (17x heavier than the static runner), so the per-Node animated path cannot reach the S-34 hundreds-to-thousands target.
deferred.reason: owner look-decision (animated per-Node near-camera vs static-instanced crowd3d vs batched skeletal shader); the use_crowd3d A/B seam is genuinely wired (v0.99.31) so the decision is measurable; wave caps hold practical counts in the low hundreds meanwhile

deferred.title: Add a SAVE_VERSION migration dispatch and an older-format fixture test.
deferred.reason: no incompatible SAVE_VERSION bump yet; migration path premature pre-M4-lock, and the live save is atomic as of v0.99.28

deferred.title: Replace the ~14 placeholder colored-box buildings with finished models.
deferred.reason: remaining building models are art-delivery-gated (same gate as M4)

deferred.title: Sweep the residual Midjourney/Tripo tool names from the GDD changelog body.
deferred.reason: batch-2 voice sweep + check_gdd_voice.py ratchet cover genuine third-person/reader-address tells; the residual tool names are factual asset-pipeline documentation a solo dev would legitimately keep

deferred.title: Re-scope M4 to separate the shipped engineering track from the art-and-mission gate.
deferred.reason: blocked on art/mission delivery; metric-honesty re-scope, not a kill signal

barRaise.actionsClearedNote: 2026-07-07 direct-evidence carry-forward pass: only two non-code commits since 2026-07-05 (outputs/ scratch cleanup, routine rename to bar-raise-hordes) and a clean tree, so re-verified each open finding on disk rather than re-fanning. Nothing closed and nothing new: save_load GDD drift still tracked by pending hbh-gdd-saveload-structural-refs-2026-07-05, CLAUDE.md:58 Midjourney line still present, no catch-up added to the renamed routine, queue-drain field mismatch unchanged. Health holds at 88; three findings age further into chronic (x7/x7/x8).
